title: Work with Codex from anywhere
optimized_headline: Unlock the Freedom to Work with Codex from Any Location
raw_excerpt: Use Codex anywhere with the ChatGPT mobile app. Monitor, steer, and approve coding tasks in real time across devices and remote environments.
raw_body: Use Codex anywhere with the ChatGPT mobile app. Monitor, steer, and approve coding tasks in real time across devices and remote environments.
speedrun: OpenAI has expanded the accessibility of Codex through the ChatGPT mobile app, allowing users to manage coding tasks from anywhere. This means developers can monitor and approve code in real-time, regardless of their location. The integration aims to enhance productivity and collaboration, especially for remote teams. This shift is significant as it reflects a growing trend towards flexible work environments in tech.
why_it_matters: Developers can now manage coding tasks on the go, improving workflow and responsiveness in project management.
This move indicates a broader industry trend towards mobile solutions, making coding more accessible and adaptable for remote work.

lenses.eli12: Now, you can use Codex on your phone with the ChatGPT app, making it easier to manage coding tasks from anywhere. Imagine having a personal coding assistant that follows you around, ready to help. This matters because it empowers people to work more flexibly, fitting coding into their busy lives.
lenses.pm: For product managers and founders, this development highlights a growing user need for mobile solutions in coding. It could reduce the time and cost associated with remote project management. Teams might find it easier to stay aligned, leading to faster project delivery and improved collaboration.
lenses.engineer: The integration of Codex into the ChatGPT mobile app allows real-time monitoring and approval of coding tasks, which could streamline workflows. This capability suggests a shift towards more interactive and versatile development environments. It’s essential to consider how this could impact existing coding processes and team dynamics.
